api/client/python/openmeter.purpose: Public import surface for the OpenMeter Python SDK — a thin shim layer that re-exports generated client, models, and operations from _generated/ while providing a stable, version-pinned API. The primary constraint is that no business logic lives here; only wiring generated internals to public-facing imports.

patterns.name: Thin shim over _generated
patterns.description: All operation and model implementations live in _generated/. Top-level packages (aio/, models/, operations/) only re-export via wildcard imports. No new methods or classes are defined here.

patterns.name: Client subclasses generated OpenMeterClient
patterns.description: _client.py defines Client(OpenMeterClient) with token injection via ServiceKeyCredential and ServiceKeyCredentialPolicy. All operation routing is inherited, not re-implemented.

patterns.name: _patch_sdk() call at module end
patterns.description: Every __init__.py must call _patch_sdk() after all imports so runtime patches from _generated/_patch.py are applied. Omitting silently breaks customizations.

patterns.name: Graceful _patch ImportError guard
patterns.description: All imports of _patch symbols are wrapped in try/except ImportError, setting _patch_all = [] as fallback. This allows the package to work when no _patch.py exists.

patterns.name: __all__ extension pattern
patterns.description: __all__ is declared with explicit public names, then extended with _patch_all entries not already present, preserving forward compatibility.
patterns.example:
__all__ = ['Client']
__all__.extend([p for p in _patch_all if p not in __all__])

patterns.name: TYPE_CHECKING-only patch import
patterns.description: _patch symbols are imported under TYPE_CHECKING guard for static analysis, with the actual runtime import inside the try/except block.

patterns.name: Union type aliases in _types.py
patterns.description: _types.py defines discriminated Union aliases (e.g. App, RateCard, Entitlement) using string-quoted forward references to _models to avoid circular imports at runtime.

key_file_guides.role: Defines the public Client class — subclasses generated OpenMeterClient and injects Bearer token authentication policy. Only customization allowed: constructor defaults and auth wiring.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Never add operation methods here — they must come from OpenMeterClient. Ensure __enter__/__exit__ delegates to super().

key_file_guides.role: Package entry point: exports Client, VERSION, COMMIT, and any _patch symbols. Must call _patch_sdk() last.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Missing _patch_sdk() call silently disables all runtime patches. __all__ must extend from _patch_all.

key_file_guides.role: Defines Union type aliases for polymorphic API types (App, RateCard, Entitlement, etc.) using forward-reference strings to avoid circular imports.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Duplicate App alias defined twice (lines 161 and 190) — likely a generation artifact. All type aliases use TYPE_CHECKING-safe string references.

key_file_guides.role: Single VERSION constant consumed by __init__.py. Overwritten by make gen-api.
Single COMMIT constant stamped at generation time.
PEP 561 marker — signals to type checkers that this package ships type stubs.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Must not be deleted; required for mypy/pyright to respect inline types.

anti_patterns: Defining new operation classes or methods directly in __init__.py or _client.py — all operations must come from _generated
Removing or relocating the _patch_sdk() call — runtime patches will silently not apply
Manually editing files under _generated/ — they are overwritten by make gen-api
Adding hard runtime imports of _patch symbols outside the try/except ImportError guard — causes ImportError when _patch.py is missing
Manually maintaining __all__ without extending from _patch_all — breaks forward compatibility when new symbols are patched in

decisions.decision: Client subclasses generated OpenMeterClient rather than wrapping it
decisions.rationale: Inheritance gives automatic access to all generated operation attributes without proxying. Constructor-level auth injection (ServiceKeyCredential) is the only customization needed.

decisions.decision: Optional _patch.py overlay with graceful ImportError fallback
decisions.rationale: _patch.py is the sole file preserved across regenerations as a customization boundary. The fallback ensures the package loads without it in minimal deployments.

decisions.decision: Union type aliases isolated in _types.py with string forward references
decisions.rationale: Discriminated unions for polymorphic API types (App, RateCard, etc.) need to reference _models without triggering circular imports at module load time; string quotes defer resolution to type checkers.

code_examples.scenario: Defining the public Client with token auth injection
